name: S&P 500
description: Tracks 500 large-cap US companies across all major sectors, widely regarded as the best gauge of the US stock market.

name: Dow Jones Industrial Average
description: One of the oldest and most cited stock indices, tracking 30 blue-chip US companies across major industries.

name: NASDAQ Composite
description: Covers all stocks listed on the NASDAQ exchange, heavily weighted toward technology and growth companies.

name: Russell 2000
description: Measures the performance of 2,000 small-cap US companies, a key benchmark for domestic economic health.

name: FTSE 100
description: Tracks the 100 largest companies by market cap listed on the London Stock Exchange, the main UK equity benchmark.

name: DAX
description: Germany's primary stock index tracking the 40 largest companies on the Frankfurt exchange, a key barometer for the Eurozone.

name: CAC 40
description: France's benchmark stock market index tracking the 40 largest equities on Euronext Paris.

name: Euro Stoxx 50
description: Blue-chip index representing 50 of the largest companies in the Eurozone across 8 countries.

name: Nikkei 225
description: Japan's most widely followed stock index tracking 225 blue-chip companies on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

name: Hang Seng
description: Main benchmark index of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, tracking the largest and most liquid companies.

name: Shanghai Composite
description: Tracks all stocks (A-shares and B-shares) listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange, China's primary mainland benchmark.

name: ASX 200
description: Australia's primary stock market benchmark, covering the 200 largest companies by float-adjusted market capitalisation.

name: TSX Composite
description: Canada's main equity benchmark covering the largest companies on the Toronto Stock Exchange across all sectors.

name: BOVESPA (Ibovespa)
description: Brazil's principal stock exchange index, tracking the most actively traded and representative stocks on B3.

name: SENSEX
description: India's oldest and most tracked stock index, comprising 30 financially sound and well-established companies on BSE.

name: Nifty 50
description: NSE's flagship index covering 50 large-cap Indian companies across 13 sectors, a key Indian equity benchmark.

name: KOSPI
description: Korea Composite Stock Price Index tracking all common stocks listed on the Korea Exchange main board.

name: MOEX Russia Index
description: Russia's primary ruble-denominated stock index tracking the 50 most liquid shares on the Moscow Exchange.

name: SMI
description: Switzerland's leading blue-chip stock index representing the 20 largest and most liquid stocks on the SIX Exchange.

name: AEX
description: Netherlands' main stock index tracking the 25 most actively traded companies on Euronext Amsterdam.
